test_strategy_covers_unit_integration_e2.evidence: test-strategy.md covers unit (28 cases), integration (3 cases), backward compatibility guards (3 cases). E2E, security, performance explicitly scoped out with justification: pure-data module with no I/O, no user input, no HTTP — only frozen objects and Map lookups.

test_cases_exist_for_all_requirements.evidence: 30 test cases across 3 test files covering all 6 FRs (FR-001 through FR-006) and all 19 ACs. Test case IDs: TS-01..TS-16, TR-01..TR-10, TB-01..TB-04.

traceability_matrix_complete.evidence: traceability-matrix.csv has 31 rows mapping all 19 ACs to 30 test cases. 100% requirement coverage. No orphan tests. FR-004 AC-004-04 covered by existing test suite (no new test needed).

coverage_targets_defined.evidence: 100% statement and branch coverage for all 6 new files. Total test count: 1582 + 34 = 1616 (above 1582 regression baseline per Article II).

test_data_strategy_documented.evidence: test-data-plan.md defines golden values from requirements spec, invalid inputs (null, undefined, empty string, unknown type), boundary values (max_iterations range, members array size), and mutation attempts on frozen objects.

critical_paths_identified.evidence: 4 critical paths: getTeamSpec() lookup correctness, getTeamSpec() error handling for unknown types, Object.freeze immutability enforcement, CJS bridge-to-ESM delegation parity.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Test-First Development
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: 30 test cases designed in Phase 05 before implementation (Phase 06). Unit + integration coverage planned. 100% coverage target for new files.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Artifact Traceability
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: Traceability matrix maps all 19 ACs across 6 FRs to 30 test cases. 100% requirement coverage. No orphan tests. No orphan requirements.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Quality Gate Integrity
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: All 6 GATE-04 checklist items pass. All 4 required artifacts produced: test-strategy.md, test-cases.md, traceability-matrix.csv, test-data-plan.md.

constitutional_articles_validated.name: Integration Testing Integrity
constitutional_articles_validated.evidence: 3 integration tests: registry-to-specs roundtrip (TR-10), CJS-to-ESM getTeamSpec parity (TB-02), CJS-to-ESM listTeamTypes parity (TB-03). These validate real component interactions, not mocked assumptions.
